title: Consent Gate Schemas
description: ConsentPayload and ConsentDecision entry-type schemas for the FLOSSI0ULLK Consent Gate Protocol (ADR-12). Substrate-class governance — enforced at Holochain integrity zome layer where LLMs cannot evade.

ConsentPayload.description: A request offered to an agent to load, integrate, propagate, or bind a memetic pattern. Written by the proposer; awaits a ConsentDecision from the recipient.

payload_id.description: UUID v7 (time-sortable) unique per consent request

pattern_id.description: Stable identifier of the pattern being offered (ADR hash, kernel version tag, frame id, voter persona name, claim id, etc.)

pattern_type.description: Class of memetic pattern. `kernel` and `constitution` are Substrate-class by default; others may vary

pattern_hash.description: Immutable SHA-256 reference to the exact payload content

proposer_did.description: DID of who is offering — KERI AID, AD4M DID, or Holochain AgentPubKey

recipient_did.description: DID of who is being asked. For collective consent (steward vote, constitutional ratification), use a group DID

blast_radius.description: Mirrors consensus gate radii. Substrate-class consent is non-overridable once given (per ADR-12 §6)

consent_scope.description: Authorization gradient. read_only < integrate < propagate < bind. Higher scopes imply lower scopes for the same pattern_hash

refusal_modes.description: Which refusal options the recipient has. All four are first-class operations per ADR-12 §4; constraining this list requires Substrate-class authorization

refusable_until.description: ISO-8601 timestamp by which the recipient must decide. Absence means no deadline (open-ended consent request)

parent_consent_id.description: Holochain ActionHash of the parent ConsentPayload for hierarchical patterns (e.g. constitution → derived claim). Null for root requests. This is an action hash, not a UUID — the coordinator and integrity entry type deserialize it as Option<ActionHash>.

rationale.description: Optional context explaining why this consent is requested

ConsentDecision.description: An agent's explicit decision on a ConsentPayload. Written by the recipient (or a group's quorum mechanism for collective DIDs). Append-only on source chain.

payload_action_hash.description: Holochain ActionHash of the ConsentPayload this decision answers. This is the binding the coordinator's create_consent_decision requires (the source-chain address), not the payload's UUID.

payload_id.description: Optional UUID cross-reference to the ConsentPayload. The coordinator binds by payload_action_hash; this is informational.

outcome.description: Per ADR-12 §4. `accepted` grants full scope; `bounded_accept` narrows scope; `tourist_observe` per CFIS [auth:tourist]; `counter_propose` adds a counter-frame reference

scope_granted.description: Subset of the ConsentPayload's consent_scope actually granted. MUST be a subset of the request's consent_scope. Empty array iff outcome=rejected

rationale.description: Required when outcome != accepted. The why behind the bound, refusal, or counter-frame

counter_frame_ref.description: If outcome=counter_propose: hash or claim_id of the counter-frame attached. Otherwise null

expires_at.description: If consent is time-bounded. Null for permanent grants
